problem.statement: SCE needs one canonical delivery projection read model for the IDE Delivery column instead of frontend heuristics across mixed files and evidence.
problem.scope: Scene-scoped delivery projection for phase-1 IDE Delivery column and CLI JSON inspection.
problem.symptom: Delivery-governance information is available only through mixed files and evidence sources, forcing frontend synthesis.

business_rule: frontend must not own parallel delivery truth

hypotheses.statement: A single delivery projection payload will make IDE integration more stable than reconstructing delivery semantics in frontend state.

risks.statement: Handoff or acceptance identity may stay unstable if provisional ids are not marked explicitly.

decision_execution_path.decision: scene-scoped projection is the phase-1 transport
release/handoff sources are reused as linked evidence where canonical ids are missing
frontend consumes one payload instead of synthesizing delivery truth locally

triggers: record identity cannot be explained canonically
actions: attach debug evidence for mismatched source mapping
